name: Clean Infographic
description: Flat, minimal infographics with clean lines. Perfect for data visualizations, statistics, comparison charts, and KPI displays.
style_prompt: Clean flat infographic style, minimal design, white background, simple geometric shapes, thin lines, modern sans-serif typography, data visualization, no photorealism, vector-art look, professional business context
color_guidance: primary blue gradient, accent light blue, neutral grays, white background, use blue for key data points and gray for supporting elements
avoid: photorealistic elements, complex 3D, heavy shadows, cluttered layouts
